description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a green cover adorned with ornate gold borders and a central floral illustration in shades of red, pink, and yellow. The front cover features a decorative motif of blooming flowers and leaves, giving it a vintage or classic appearance. The spine is also green with gold embellishments and vertical text, matching the cover's ornate style. The back cover is darker green with a block of text and a barcode at the bottom, framed by a gold border. The book's pages are visibly white and tightly bound, suggesting a substantial volume. The overall design is elegant and richly detailed, suitable for display or personal reading in an urban environment.
description: A thick, ornate hardcover book with a green cover, gold borders, and a detailed floral illustration. The spine and back are similarly decorated, giving it a classic, vintage look.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showcasing the floral illustration, gold borders, and decorative elements.
description_view_1: The book is angled to show the front cover and the white, tightly bound pages along the side.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, featuring a block of text, a barcode, and gold border details.
description_view_3: The spine is visible with gold embellishments and vertical text, along with a partial view of the back cover and pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a detailed, vintage-style illustration of blooming flowers and leafy stems in red, pink, and yellow hues. The artwork is framed by ornate gold borders and decorative flourishes, giving the cover an elegant and classic appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is green with gold decorative elements and vertical gold text, matching the ornate style of the front cover. The design includes small embellishments and borders for a classic, elegant look.
